memoryArtifacts.headline: Info from "Notes"
memoryArtifacts.description:
He married, not later than 1511 in Worcester, Margaret Greville (Grevell). With her, he acquired Arle Court near Cheltenham, where he appears to have lived during his mother's life. 
After her death t …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Lygon於1490年出生在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾馬德雷斯費爾德時，他的父親Richard Lygon24歲，母親Anne Beauchamp19歲。他於1511年與Margaret Greville在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾馬德雷斯費爾德結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他在英國武斯特斯爾被列為sheriff。他去世於1556年3月20日在英國武斯特斯爾馬德雷斯費爾德享年66歲，埋葬在英國武斯特斯爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard Lygon于1490年出生在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾馬德雷斯費爾德时，他的父亲Richard Lygon24岁，母亲Anne Beauchamp19岁。他于1511年与Margaret Greville在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾馬德雷斯費爾德结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他在英国武斯特斯爾被列为sheriff。他去世于1556年3月20日在英国武斯特斯爾馬德雷斯費爾德享年66岁，埋葬在英国武斯特斯爾。

nameMeanings.name: Lygon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Lygon, the name of an aristocratic English family said to be of Norman origin. It is of unexplained etymology (but compare French name below).
French: from the personal name Higon, a southern French variant of Hugo, with fused definite article l'.
Polish (also Ligoń): nickname from a derivative of Old Polish ligać ‘to lie’ or ‘to kick up a fuss’.

variants.name: Ligons
meanings: English: variant of Ligon , with excrescent excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Lygon was born in 1490, in Madresfield, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Lygon, was 24 and his mother, Anne Beauchamp, was 19. He married Margaret Greville in 1511, in Madresfield, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 8 daughters. His occupation is listed as sheriff in Worcestershire, England. He died on 20 March 1556, in Madresfield, Worcestershire, England, at the age of 66, and was buried in Worcestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Lygon est né en 1490, à Madresfield, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Lygon, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Anne Beauchamp, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Greville en 1511, à Madresfield, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 8 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff à Worcestershire, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 20 mars 1556, à Madresfield, Worcestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Worcestershire, Angleterre.

Er hat 1511 in Madresfield, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom Margaret Greville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 8 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als sheriff in Worcestershire, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 20. Lui sposato Margaret Greville nel 1511, nel Madresfield, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 8 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Lygonが1490年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアマドレスフィールドで生まれた時，父Richard Lygonは24歳，母Anne Beauchampは19歳であった。1511年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアマドレスフィールドでMargaret Grevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。イギリスウオルセステルシュアイアでの職業はsheriffと記録されている。彼は1556年3月20日にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアマドレスフィールドで66歳で死去し，イギリスウオルセステルシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Lygon(이)가 1490년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 매드레스필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Lygon(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Beauchamp(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1511년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 매드레스필드에서 Margaret Greville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 워스스터실르에서 sheriff이었다. 그는 1556년 3월 20일 영국 워스스터실르 매드레스필드에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워스스터실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Lygon nasceu em 1490, em Madresfield, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Lygon, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Anne Beauchamp, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Greville em 1511, em Madresfield, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 8 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como sheriff em Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 20 de março de 1556, em Madresfield, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Worcestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Lygon родился в 1490 г. в местности мадресфиелд, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard Lygon было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Anne Beauchamp, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Greville в 1511 г. в местности мадресфиелд, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 8 дочерей.  Он работал по профессии sheriff в местности ворсестиршир, Англия. Он умер 20 марта 1556 г. в местности мадресфиелд, ворсестиршир, Англия в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности ворсестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Richard Lygon nació en 1490, en Madresfield, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard Lygon, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Anne Beauchamp, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Margaret Greville en 1511, en Madresfield, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 8 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era sheriff en Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Murió el 20 de marzo de 1556, en Madresfield, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Worcestershire, Inglaterra.
